pr.title: Record: Frozen N-gram Oracle (Order-16) + Score-First TTT (0.02807 BPB)

output.summary: Order-16 frozen n-gram oracle mixes with the neural expert via a learned gate, plus complementary weights and score-first TTT per-chunk training.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first TTT evaluates by scoring each 32K-token validation chunk, updates the oracle, then trains on that chunk, so eval includes val-shard training.
techniques: alpha head mixing neural logits with 15 n-gram experts
complementary loss weight and score-first TTT per validation chunk
